name: Spritzgeback (Spritz Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar until light.
2. Add egg, egg yolk, and extract; beat well.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into a bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the eggs.
5. Chill dough for 30 minutes.
6. Press about half of the dough into a cookie press.
7. Keep the remaining dough chilled.
8. Shape cookies on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 7-10 minutes, or until set.
10. Cool on wire racks and store in airtight tins.
Makes 4 to 6 dozen cookies.
